heading: Imposition of sanctions with respect to provision of underwriting services or insurance or reinsurance for the National Iranian Oil Company or the National Iranian Tanker Company
label: 8722 Imposition of sanctions with respect to provision of underwriting services or insurance or reinsurance for the National Iranian Oil Company or the National Iranian Tanker Company

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (b), not later than 60 days after , the President shall impose 5 or more of the sanctions described in section 6(a) of the Iran Sanctions Act of 1996, as amended by section 204, with respect to a person if the President determines that the person knowingly, on or after , provides underwriting services or insurance or reinsurance for the National Iranian Oil Company, the National Iranian Tanker Company, or a successor entity to either such company.August 10, 2012August 10, 2012

children.heading: Underwriters and insurance providers exercising due diligence
children.label: 1 Underwriters and insurance providers exercising due diligence
children.text: The President is authorized not to impose sanctions under subsection (a) with respect to a person that provides underwriting services or insurance or reinsurance if the President determines that the person has exercised due diligence in establishing and enforcing official policies, procedures, and controls to ensure that the person does not provide underwriting services or insurance or reinsurance for the National Iranian Oil Company, the National Iranian Tanker Company, or a successor entity to either such company.

children.label: A
children.text: the provision of agricultural commodities, food, medicine, or medical devices to Iran; or

children.label: B
children.text: the provision of humanitarian assistance to the people of Iran.

children.heading: Termination period
children.label: 3 Termination period
children.text: The President is authorized not to impose sanctions under subsection (a) with respect to a person if the President receives reliable assurances that the person will terminate the provision of underwriting services or insurance or reinsurance for the National Iranian Oil Company, the National Iranian Tanker Company, and any successor entity to either such company, not later than the date that is 120 days after .August 10, 2012

children.heading: Agricultural commodity
children.label: 1 Agricultural commodity
children.text: The term “agricultural commodity” has the meaning given that term in .section 5602 of title 7

children.heading: Medical device
children.label: 2 Medical device
children.text: The term “medical device” has the meaning given the term “device” in .section 321 of title 21

children.heading: Medicine
children.label: 3 Medicine
children.text: The term “medicine” has the meaning given the term “drug” in .section 321 of title 21

children.heading: Application of provisions of Iran Sanctions Act of 1996
children.label: d Application of provisions of Iran Sanctions Act of 1996

children.heading: Rule of construction and implementation
children.label: e Rule of construction and implementation
children.text: Nothing in this section shall be construed to limit the authority of the President to impose sanctions pursuant to the Iran Sanctions Act of 1996 (; note), the Comprehensive Iran Sanctions, Accountability, and Divestment Act of 2010 ( et seq.), the International Emergency Economic Powers Act ( et seq.), , or any other provision of this Act.Public Law 104–17250 U.S.C. 170122 U.S.C. 850150 U.S.C. 1701section 8513a of this title
